## Security Vulnerability Assessment

### npm Audit Results

```
Status: No critical vulnerabilities detected
Last Audit: Package lock current
```

### pip Audit Recommendations

| Package | Current | Vulnerable In | Recommendation |
|---------|---------|---------------|----------------|
| All packages | Latest | None detected | ✅ No action needed |

### Go Security

**Recommendation:** Run `govulncheck` in each Go service:
```bash
cd services/identity-service && go run golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest
```

## Outdated Packages Analysis

### Minor Updates Available (Non-Breaking)

| Package | Current | Available | Impact | Action |

| next | 14.2.3 | 15.x | Major (breaking) | Consider for refactor |
| react | 18.3.1 | 19.x | Major (breaking) | Wait for Next.js 15 support |
| tailwindcss | 3.4.19 | 4.x | Major (breaking) | Phase 3 upgrade target |
| eslint | 8.57.1 | 9.x | Major (breaking) | Low priority |

### Recommended Upgrade Path

1. **Phase 3 (UI/UX Refactor):**
   - Upgrade to Next.js 15
   - Upgrade to Tailwind CSS 4
   - Upgrade to React 19 (if compatible)

2. **Post-Refactor:**
   - Update ESLint to 9.x
   - Review all minor version updates

## Recommendations

### Immediate Actions (Before UI Refactor)

1. ✅ **No critical security updates needed**
2. ⚠️ **Plan Next.js 15 upgrade** as part of Phase 3
3. ⚠️ **Plan Tailwind CSS 4 upgrade** as part of Phase 3

### Phase 3 Upgrades

```bash
# Upgrade core framework
npm install next@latest react@latest react-dom@latest

# Upgrade styling
npm install tailwindcss@latest @tailwindcss/typography @tailwindcss/forms

# Add new dependencies for 2026 standards
npm install framer-motion@latest lucide-react@latest
npm install @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu
npm install class-variance-authority@latest
```

### Post-Refactor Actions

1. Add visual regression testing: `npm install -D @chromatic-com/storybook`
2. Add accessibility testing: `npm install -D @axe-core/react`
3. Add performance monitoring: `npm install -D web-vitals`
4. Add bundle analyzer: `npm install -D @next/bundle-analyzer`
